UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides, Center is present. Represented by Jack McKeen.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sangea Young is present.
Attorney Catherine Danielson representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jim Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of MAR-12-2012 is vacated.
